chrome_web_store.name: Lazynext — AI Video Editor
chrome_web_store.short_description: Capture any video into your Lazynext timeline. AI-powered editing, one click.
chrome_web_store.description:
Lazynext is the autonomous video editor. This extension lets you capture videos from any webpage — YouTube, TikTok, Vimeo, social media — and send them directly to your Lazynext timeline for instant AI-powered editing.

● One-click capture from any page with a video
● Right-click any video → Send to Lazynext
● Automatically detects videos on the current tab
● Pairs with the Lazynext Web App (localhost:3000 or lazynext.ai)
● Video timeline preview in the extension popup

Just speak or type what you want to create — Lazynext's Chronos AI agent handles the rest.

apple_app_store.name: Lazynext — AI Video Editor
apple_app_store.subtitle: Type. Speak. Edit. Done.
apple_app_store.description:
Lazynext is the autonomous video editor built for the AI era. Just type or speak in plain language — Lazynext handles the cutting, grading, masking, and motion graphics automatically.

● AI Copilot: Chronos understands plain language editing commands
● GPU Compositor: 17 blend modes, 11 effect shaders, real-time preview
● Multiplayer: Edit the same timeline with collaborators worldwide
● Desktop App: Native GPUI performance with DeckLink SDI output
● Export: MP4, ProRes, DCP, AAF, MOV

Built on Rust, WebAssembly, and WebGPU for native desktop performance.

google_play.name: Lazynext — AI Video Editor
google_play.short_description: Type or speak. Lazynext edits for you.
google_play.full_description:
Lazynext is the autonomous video editor built for the AI era. Just type or speak in plain language — the Chronos AI Copilot handles the cutting, grading, masking, and motion graphics automatically.

● AI Copilot: Natural language editing commands
● GPU Compositor: 17 blend modes, 11 effect shaders
● Multiplayer CRDT: Real-time collaborative editing
● Export: MP4, ProRes, DCP, MOV
● Native performance via Rust + UniFFI

Built on Rust for maximum performance.
